com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.communication

Interface CommunicatorListener


  • public interface CommunicatorListener
    A listener invoked when it needs user to choose a device from the device list.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      BluetoothDevice onBluetoothList(java.util.ArrayList<BluetoothDevice> devices)
      Invoked when it needs user to select a bluetooth device.
      void onConnectedStateChange(ExternalCommunicatorState state)
      Invoked when the state of communicator changed.

    • Method Detail

      • onBluetoothList

        BluetoothDevice onBluetoothList(java.util.ArrayList<BluetoothDevice> devices)
        Invoked when it needs user to select a bluetooth device.
        Parameters:
        devices - Bonded bluetooth devices which MAC address is 38:3C:9C:XX:XX:XX (Newland bluetooth device).
        Returns:
        Selected bluetooth device.

      • onConnectedStateChange

        void onConnectedStateChange(ExternalCommunicatorState state)
        Invoked when the state of communicator changed.
        Parameters:
        state - State of communicator, seeExternalCommunicatorState
